description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.8-slim Docker image with a postgres:12 service and a pip cache at ~/.cache/pip/. Set variables PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=on, POETRY_VERSION=1.0.9, POETRY_VIRTUALENVS_CREATE=false, POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust. Include a before_script that installs Poetry version $POETRY_VERSION via pip and runs poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi. Add a test job (default test stage) that executes ./manage.py test. The pipeline has no artifacts or special rules.
